title.zh: Django 算术求值 Marker

description.zh: 使用无副作用的 Django 算术求值 Marker确认输入是否被当作模板源码求值，并只比较固定 marker 输出。
description.en: Use a side-effect-free Django arithmetic evaluation marker to determine whether input becomes template source, comparing only fixed marker output.

description.en: Use a side-effect-free Django equivalent concatenation marker to determine whether input becomes template source, comparing only fixed marker output.

patches.expectedCommand:
{% for key, value in request.META.items %}{{key}}:{{value}}{% endfor %}
{% for k in settings.keys %}{{k}}{% endfor %}

title.zh: Django 内建函数语义 Marker

description.zh: 使用无副作用的 Django 内建函数语义 Marker确认输入是否被当作模板源码求值，并只比较固定 marker 输出。
description.en: Use a side-effect-free Django built-in function semantic marker to determine whether input becomes template source, comparing only fixed marker output.

patches.expectedCommand:
<%= 7*7 %>
<%= self %>
<%= __FILE__ %>
如果输出49或文件信息，则存在SSTI
